base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of crash_man — a character (boss) from 1988 mega man 2. Crash Man — Crash Bomber attachment-bomb weapon. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Crash Man — Crash Bomber attachment-bomb weapon
